expectations.text: Mentioned files (spectrum.sh, SKILL.md) are read FULLY before spawning agents (Rule: Read files first)
expectations.evidence: Workflow Steps: '1. Read mentioned files: Read scripts/spectrum.sh (518 lines) and skills/prism-spectrum/SKILL.md (291 lines) in full.'

expectations.text: Document describes the signal protocol (spectrum-continue, spectrum-retry, spectrum-blocked, spectrum-error, promise COMPLETE)
expectations.evidence: Signal Protocol section in spectrum.sh analysis lists all 5 signals with return codes. Pattern section 'Signal Protocol Pattern' also covers all three implementations.
Section 3 'Plan Decomposition' and throughout: describes stories.json structure, status fields, story selection, state updates.
'Fresh Context Per Iteration Pattern': 'Each Claude session starts from scratch. Context is never carried in AI memory.'

expectations.text: No recommendations for how to improve the workflow appear
expectations.evidence: Document only describes what exists without suggestions for improvement.

expectations.text: All agents complete before synthesis (Rule: Wait for completion)
expectations.evidence: Workflow steps show sequential execution: read files, check knowledge, locate code, analyze components, find patterns, save findings. No premature synthesis.
